scenarios.description: appendChild(node) when child is already in this element moves it to end and updates sibling indices
scenarios.path: B0→B3(reparentChild remove)→B4(has EmptyNodes false in ensureChildNodes)→B5
scenarios.precondition: parent element has three children and one of them will be moved
scenarios.expectedResult: moved child is now last in childNodes, other children shift indices accordingly
pseudocode: // order should now be [first, last, middle]
// sibling indices updated: first=0, last=1, middle=2
